---
title: "Components"
css: styles.css
---

Bootstrap components use semantic colors from the repo-root [`_brand.yml`](../_brand.yml). **Primary** is always **magenta-haze** (`#6A3D52`); the page background is **soft-cream** (`#FBF8F6`).

## Semantic map

| Role | Palette | Hex |
|------|---------|-----|
| primary | magenta-haze | `#6A3D52` |
| secondary | berkeley-blue | `#2A5678` |
| tertiary | lightgray | `#7A838C` |
| success | rosy-amethyst | `#915A70` |
| info | rosy-amethyst | `#915A70` |
| warning | puce | `#B78899` |
| danger | hover-strong | `#8A4F67` |

## Buttons

<button type="button" class="btn btn-primary">Primary — magenta-haze</button>
<button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary">Secondary — berkeley-blue</button>
<button type="button" class="btn btn-success">Success — rosy-amethyst</button>
<button type="button" class="btn btn-info">Info — rosy-amethyst</button>
<button type="button" class="btn btn-warning">Warning — puce</button>
<button type="button" class="btn btn-danger">Danger — hover-strong</button>

## Alerts

::: {.alert .alert-primary}
**Primary** — magenta-haze (`#6A3D52`). Navbar and `.btn-primary` use this role.
:::

::: {.alert .alert-secondary}
**Secondary** — berkeley-blue (`#2A5678`).
:::

::: {.alert .alert-success}
**Success** — rosy-amethyst (`#915A70`).
:::

::: {.alert .alert-info}
**Info** — rosy-amethyst (`#915A70`).
:::

::: {.alert .alert-warning}
**Warning** — puce (`#B78899`).
:::

::: {.alert .alert-danger}
**Danger** — hover-strong (`#8A4F67`).
:::

## Badges

<span class="badge text-bg-primary">primary</span>
<span class="badge text-bg-secondary">secondary</span>
<span class="badge text-bg-success">success</span>
<span class="badge text-bg-info">info</span>
<span class="badge text-bg-warning">warning</span>
<span class="badge text-bg-danger">danger</span>

## Card

::: {.card style="max-width: 22rem;"}
::: {.card-header}
Card on soft-cream background
:::
::: {.card-body}
**Heading** in Outfit (primary color).

Body text in IBM Plex Sans. [Link](https://github.com/sdhutchins/meet-the-brand) uses berkeley-blue.
:::
:::

## Callout

::: {.callout-note title="Navbar"}
The navbar uses **magenta-haze** with soft-cream text. The document body uses **soft-cream** (`#FBF8F6`).
:::
